title: Reply
description: Adds   /r   command so players can easily reply to the last person that whispered them.
body:
### Reply 
A server-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21 - 1.21.11 \
Adds a `/r` command so players can easily reply to the last person that whispered them.\
Players can connect to a server running this mod, and use the command, using a Vanilla client.
### Dependencies
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- Minecraft 1.21+
- Fabric Loader 0.16.8+

No configuration required. Simply reply to messages with `/r <message>`.
